welcome.title: Welcome to The Stem
welcome.subtitle: Set up your admin password to get started

username.label: Username:
username.description: This is your admin username for The Stem.

custom.title: Create my own password
custom.description: Enter a custom password of your choice.

generated.title: Use generated password
generated.description: Use a secure random password (save it somewhere safe!).
generated.saveWarning: Save this password securely - you won't see it again!

role.title: Choose this stem's role
role.subtitle: Each stem instance runs as either a passive Reflector or an active Test Master. You can switch roles later from the header.

reflector.title: Reflector
reflector.description: Passive loopback — bounces frames back to a Test Master for end-to-end measurement.

testMaster.title: Test Master
testMaster.description: Active testing — runs RFC 2544, Y.1564, Y.1731, MEF, TSN, and traffic-generation modules.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {{count}} characters
errors.loginFailed: Setup complete but login failed. Please sign in manually.
errors.networkError: Unable to reach server. Please try again.

footer.copyright: © {{year}} Mustard Seed Networks. All rights reserved.
